parse:
run {
  some i: Influencer
  some u: User - Influencer
  i in u.follows // Regular user follows influencer
  u not in i.follows // Influencer does not follow regular user
  all x: User | x not in x.follows
} for 4 expect 1

run {
  some disj u1, u2: User
  some i: Influencer
  u1 in i.follows
  i in u2.follows
  u2 in u1.follows
  all x: User | x not in x.follows
} for 4 expect 1
